root_cause: Multus NetworkAttachmentDefinition referenced by Pod is missing
evidence: Pod payments/claims-processor-6f8d7f6bc9-rx4b2 is Pending while kubelet creates the sandbox
Pod declares Multus network attachment(s): net-ops/vlan-120, payments/sriov-canary

Latest missing-NAD message: Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "f9db1a": plugin type="multus" failed (add): Multus: [payments/claims-processor-6f8d7f6bc9-rx4b2]: error adding container to network "net-ops/vlan-120": error in getting k8s network for pod: GetNetworkDelegates: failed getting the delegate: failed getting network "net-ops/vlan-120": network-attachment-definitions.k8s.cni.cncf.io "vlan-120" not found
Observed 4 missing NetworkAttachmentDefinition failure occurrence(s) within 30 minutes
No successful pod start or Multus AddedInterface event observed after the latest missing-NAD failure
Pod is assigned to node worker-edge-03
Missing NetworkAttachmentDefinition failures persisted for 8.0 minutes

causes.message: Pod requests one or more Multus secondary networks via k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks
A referenced NetworkAttachmentDefinition could not be found
Pod sandbox creation cannot complete because Multus cannot build the requested network delegates

pod:claims-processor-6f8d7f6bc9-rx4b2: Pod sandbox creation is blocked by a missing Multus NetworkAttachmentDefinition

Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "f9db1a": plugin type="multus" failed (add): Multus: [payments/claims-processor-6f8d7f6bc9-rx4b2]: error adding container to network "net-ops/vlan-120": error in getting k8s network for pod: GetNetworkDelegates: failed getting the delegate: failed getting network "net-ops/vlan-120": network-attachment-definitions.k8s.cni.cncf.io "vlan-120" not found
node:worker-edge-03: Kubelet on the assigned node could not complete Multus delegate lookup

likely_causes: The referenced NetworkAttachmentDefinition was never created in the Pod namespace or the explicitly referenced namespace
The Pod annotation references the wrong NetworkAttachmentDefinition name or namespace
A Helm, GitOps, or namespace provisioning step created the workload before creating the NetworkAttachmentDefinition
The NetworkAttachmentDefinition was deleted or recreated under a different name while workloads still reference it
suggested_checks: Verify the k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks annotation names and namespaces
Create or restore the missing NetworkAttachmentDefinition before restarting the Pod
Check Multus logs on the assigned node for delegate lookup failures
